# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - deploy

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE..."
    - echo "Deployment notes: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" > deployment.txt
    - git add deployment.txt
    - git commit -m "Deployed $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - git push origin main
  tags:
    - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
